data.title: [2fbd-f6b8] UPDATE: Add enforcement hook to llms.txt
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## What to do
Add entry for .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh to llms.txt near other hook entries.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] llms.txt mentions check-plugin-self-ref
  Verify: grep -q "check-plugin-self-ref" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/llms.txt
